svg.text: decode ht_head.csl — static 2-D vocab shard + diagonal-pair W_E gather
ONE sampled token per step, fed back on-chip from HT_tail. No vocab-rotation ring (that is prefill): vocab is FIXED on Y, hidden on X, and the one needed W_E row is gathered vertically.
ref config test_sim_2x2block_kv_varlen.json: P_BLOCK_SIZE=8, HT_WIDTH_tail=6, HT_WIDTH_head=4, HT_X_OFFSET=2, dim=64, dim_per_pe=8, bsz=2, vocab=24, V_per_pe_y=3
1 Spatial layout + comms (band = HT_WIDTH_tail cols x P_BLOCK_SIZE rows; embedding on the EAST 4 cols)
C1 pre_embed_x (id 18), step 0 only: per-row EAST run from the demux, terminates WEST->RAMP at that row's diag col. P-6 p2p, no multicast.
tok_bcast (id 7) from HT_tail: SOUTH -> {RAMP, NORTH} on EVERY column = P-2 router multicast. Per-round N header, then bsz token ids per step.
W_E gather NORTH on UP_A/UP_B (ids 21/22) — G-1 parity chain + P-5 shuttle. Two dim_per_pe halves per lane; colors alternate by row parity.
W_E gather SOUTH on DOWN_A/DOWN_B (ids 8/9, reused K-pipe ids on a PE-disjoint rectangle). Halves emitted in REVERSE order (consumer order flips).
C2 post_embed_x (id 23): both diag PEs emit bsz*dim_per_pe fp16 EAST into decode block row 0, on EVERY step. Also the early-stop sentinel path.
ht_ready (id 0): col-0 PEs send 1 wavelet WEST at the end of init(), after painting C1 — unblocks demux main (first-paint fence).
Diagonal pairing IS the re-layout (P-4 seam): column eff owns hidden [16eff,16eff+16); upper-diag PE (py=2eff) takes the low 8, lower-diag (py=2eff+1) the high 8.
Across py that is exactly the hidden Y-shard decode row 0 wants — asserted at launch.py:564 (HT_WIDTH_head * 2 * dim_per_pe == dim). Break it and row 0 hangs on a count mismatch.
Cost: O(|src_py - diag|) hops per lane per step, run bsz times SERIALLY. Not amortised — that is the price of not rotating, and the right trade for one token per step.
2 Task state machine (same program on every band PE; coords pick the role)
per lane b: src_py = t / V_per_pe_y
1-hop when src_py is on the diag pair
fires on EVERY step incl. step 0

colors/queues: tok_bcast(7)/iq2 · pre_embed_x(18)/iq3 · UP_A(21)/iq4,oq3 · UP_B(22)/iq5,oq4 · DOWN_A(8)/iq6,oq6 · DOWN_B(9)/iq7,oq7 · post_embed_x(23)/oq2 · ht_ready(0)/oq5. DOWN_* reuse K-pipe ids on a PE-disjoint rectangle (launch.py:691-694).
